events.name: JKYog YUVA
events.special_notes: JKYog YUVA At JKYog, we believe in transformation through wisdom. By leading a virtuous life, we not only benefit ourselves but also contribute to creating a more harmonious and compassionate world. Aiming to nurture holistic wellbeing and empower individuals on their spiritual journey, JKYog has launched an innovative initiative tailored for young adults. JKYog YUVA Empowering Young Minds & Professionals JKYog YUVA At JKYog, we believe in transformation through wisdom. By leading a virtuous life, we not only benefit ourselves but also contribute to creating a more harmonious and compassionate world. Aiming to nurture holistic wellbeing and empower individuals on their spiritual journey, JKYog has launched an innovative initiative tailored for young adults. Our Mission Through engaging workshops, seminars, study groups, and mentorship opportunities, JKYog's YUVA strives to create a platform for personal growth, fostering a generation that is not only successful but also deeply connected to their inner selves and the world around them. Our Inspiration Swami Mukundananda is a renowned global leader, teacher of spirituality and yoga, best-selling author, and international authority on mind management. An alumnus of the prestigious institutes IIT and IIM, he is a highly gifted and charismatic personality. Forsaking a promising corporate career, Swamiji became a sanyasi (monk) and dedicated his life to guiding millions on the path of happiness and fulfillment. IN-PERSON • UPCOMING EVENT UTD Ram Navami Mahotsav Join us to celebrate the auspicious occasion of Ram Navami with devotion, cultural performances, and fun activities for everyone! Event Details Festival Celebration Highlights include Hare Ram Namsankirtan, Hanuman Chalisa, Cultural Performance, Making Panchamrut & Abhishek of Lord Ram, Ram Setu competition, Charades on Ramayan, and Maha Aarti. Dinner Mahaprasad will be served. 📅 Date Wednesday, March 25 ⏰ Time 6:00 PM - 8:00 PM 📍 Location SU Plinth, UTD The University of Texas at Dallas How to Join RSVP is Required. Please register to secure your spot for the festivities and Dinner Mahaprasad. Register for the Event → In Collaboration With: JKYog YUVA & Radha Krishna Temple of Dallas. By leading a virtuous life, we not only benefit ourselves but also contribute to creating a more harmonious and compassionate world. Aiming to nurture holistic wellbeing and empower individuals on their spiritual journey, JKYog has launched an innovative initiative tailored for young adults. Our Mission Through engaging workshops, seminars, study groups, and mentorship opportunities, JKYog's YUVA strives to create a platform for personal growth, fostering a generation that is not only successful but also deeply connected to their inner selves and the world around them. Our Inspiration Swami Mukundananda is a renowned global leader, teacher of spirituality and yoga, best-selling author, and international authority on mind management. An alumnus of the prestigious institutes IIT and IIM, he is a highly gifted and charismatic personality. Forsaking a promising corporate career, Swamiji became a sanyasi (monk) and dedicated his life to guiding millions on the path of happiness and fulfillment.
